skill.expanded.hunter.poisonous_blood.de: Your blood becomes toxic to vampires that try to drink it.
skill.expanded.hunter.resolve.desc: Strengthens your resolve against hostile blood magic.
skill.expanded.vampire.blood_focus.desc: Study the finer points of blood manipulation.
skill.expanded.vampire.shadow_sense.desc: Sharpen your senses in the dark.
skill.expanded.werewolf.moon_sense.desc: Attune yourself to the rhythm of the moon.
skill.expanded.werewolf.pack_instinct.de: Move and fight with instinctive pack coordination.
